meta.title: DEF CON 29 Cloud Village - Batuhan Sancak - Azure Active Directory Hacking Wars
meta.description: Azure is one of the most popular cloud services today. It has 15.4 million customers worldwide. 95% of Fortune 500 companies use Azure. If you look at it from the hacker point of view, that's perfect. Is Azure completely secure? No! No system is completely secure. It would be good to talk about Azure and talk about attack techniques. Check out the attack vectors. The results obtained by comparing attack vectors and defense vectors will be beneficial for everyone. In this presentation, I would like to talk about Azure Active Directory technology and attack vectors
